info.name: POS Backend API
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the POS Backend Service.

**Setup:**
1. Set `baseUrl` variable (default: `http://localhost:5000`)
2. Set `tenantId` variable with a valid tenant GUID
3. Call `POST /auth/login` and copy `data.accessToken` and `data.refreshToken` to the corresponding variables
